content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need FileSystemLoader in the same file - can't cleanly split by class. Proposal: sequential editing, not parallel. My change is small and additive: adds fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader.__init__, and extends the existing directory-search loop in get_source() + list_templates() to also scan fallback dirs after primary ones. I'll go FIRST since it's a small self-contained diff, then send DONE. You then edit the resulting file to add your path_transform hooks across all loader classes (BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/etc), placing your transform call wherever fits your hook design without reverting my fallback_searchpath logic. Sound OK? Reply ACCEPT to confirm order, then I'll start immediately.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__ fallback_searchpath param + fallback search logic in FileSystemLoader.get_source/list_templates)
note: Finished fallback_searchpath implementation in FileSystemLoader. Changes: added fallback_searchpath param to __init__ (normalized to list like searchpath), stored as self.fallback_searchpath, and get_source()/list_templates() now iterate over (*self.searchpath, *self.fallback_searchpath) so primary paths are always checked first. Tests in tests/test_loader.py pass (40/40). You're clear to add your path_transform hooks now - please only add an additive hook (e.g. transform template name at the very top of get_source) and don't alter the tuple-iteration lines I added.
